project_type: Static HTML website (multi-page site with component includes)
build_system: None - static files served via Cloudflare Workers (wrangler.jsonc)
test_framework: None - manual verification via file structure
test_command: N/A (static HTML - verify via checking file exists and has valid HTML structure)
verification_instructions: 1. Confirm /pages/mdwa.html exists. 2. Check HTML structure is valid. 3. Confirm calculator JSON data is embedded. 4. Verify page uses shared CSS and main.js patterns.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML project
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external packages needed. This is pure static HTML/CSS/JS.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing page patterns (mdla.html, mps-flexi.html). Use shared /assets/style.css. Load header/footer via component loader in main.js. Use inline <style> for page-specific styles.
key_patterns: 1. Each product page is a single HTML file under /pages/. 2. Page-specific CSS goes in an inline
directory_structure: /pages/ - product HTML pages | /assets/ - shared CSS and JS | /components/ - header.html and footer.html loaded via JS | /Source/MDWA/ - source PDFs/Excel (reference only) | /Sample/ - older standalone sample pages
